543.reason: [This line adds the closing '/' of the comment block, but the while loop condition already consumes the '*' and '/' characters. When the loop exits, currentChar is '*' and nextChar is '/', so after the loop, addChar() adds the '/' to currentWord, but the '*' was already added in the previous iteration. This results in the '/' being added as part of the token, which is incorrect. The correct behavior should be to not add the closing '/' to the token, as it is part of the comment syntax, not the code.]
